subcodes.first_line: O self-sacrificing servant of Baha! Your numerous letters have arrived and their contents brought joy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده جانفشان بها مکاتیب متعدده شما رسید مضامین شادمانی بخشید از محافل
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @charitable associations; humanitarian activities, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
